## What's new

- You can now import custom map packages using the new "Import" button in the start menu!
  - When importing, you will be prompted to select a .zip file
  - This zip file assumes a usual map package structure (i.e similar to what this editor exports, both .osu and .txt is supported)
  
I was able to successfully test this with a few custom maps, but if you have any issues, let me know.
